ActionButton.description: A CTA button on a landing page.
ActionButton.title: ActionButton

ActiveFilter.description: A currently-applied filter shown as a removable tag.
ActiveFilter.title: ActiveFilter

AlertCard.description: An alert/status card in the diagnostics view.

count.description: Numeric count shown as a link, e.g. '9 Sign-ins...'
count.title: Count

AlertCard.title: AlertCard

BadgeColor.description: Semantic badge colors — maps to Fluent Badge `color` prop.
BadgeColor.title: BadgeColor

BenefitCard.description: A benefit/feature card in a marketing section.
BenefitCard.title: BenefitCard

BodySpec.description:
The main content area of the page.

Two modes:
1. **Direct** — no tabs, single body template
2. **Tabbed** — PageTabs strip + one template per tab

When tabbed, each TabBody.tab_value must correspond 1:1 with a
TabDefinition.value in tabs_spec.  The builder renders a <PageTabs>
strip and swaps the body template based on the selected tab.

LLM prompt: "Does the body have tabs?  If yes, define each tab and
its content template.  If no, pick one template and fill it in."

has_tabs.description: True if the content area has a PageTabs strip
has_tabs.title: Has Tabs

tabs_spec.description: PageTabs strip definition (required if has_tabs is True)

tab_bodies.description: One body template per tab.  Each entry's tab_value must match a TabDefinition.value in tabs_spec.  Order should match tab order.
tab_bodies.title: Tab Bodies

direct_body.description: Single body template (required if has_tabs is False)
direct_body.title: Direct Body

BodySpec.title: BodySpec

is_current.description: True for the last item in the trail
is_current.title: Is Current

BreadcrumbSpec.description:
Maps to → Storybook: AzureBreadcrumb (Composed)

LLM prompt: "List the navigation hierarchy from Home down to the
current page."

items.description: Ordered breadcrumb trail.  First item is usually Home.
items.title: Items

BreadcrumbSpec.title: BreadcrumbSpec

CardAction.description: Action link/button at the bottom of a card.
CardAction.title: CardAction

CardGridBody.description:
Maps to → Storybook: Card > CardGrid, Card > ResourceCard, Card > HeroCard

Used for: service overview pages (Monitor), dashboard widgets,
marketplace browse, resource overview KPIs.

LLM prompt: "Break the content into titled sections.  Each section
has a grid of cards.  For each card: title, description, icon, and
any action links (View, More, etc.)."
CardGridBody.title: CardGridBody

CardGridSection.description: A titled section containing a grid of cards.

columns.description: Number of card columns (uses CSS grid auto-fill)
columns.title: Columns

CardGridSection.title: CardGridSection

CardItem.description: One card in a card grid section.

icon.description: Fluent icon name for the card header
icon.title: Icon

CardItem.title: CardItem

is_link.description: Render cell value as a brand-colored link (e.g. resource name)
is_link.title: Is Link

badge_color_map.description: If set, cell values are rendered as Badges.  Keys are cell values, values are badge colors.  e.g. {'Running': 'success', 'Stopped': 'danger'}
badge_color_map.title: Badge Color Map

CommandAction.description: One action button in the command bar.

is_primary.description: True for prominent actions (left group) vs. secondary (right group)
is_primary.title: Is Primary

CommandAction.title: CommandAction

CommandBarSpec.description:
Maps to → Storybook: CommandBar (Composed)

LLM prompt: "List the toolbar actions.  Split into primary
(left-aligned, prominent) and secondary (right-aligned, subtle).
Which actions have dropdown menus?"

actions.description: All command bar actions in display order
actions.title: Actions

CommandBarSpec.title: CommandBarSpec

CopilotSuggestion.description: One Copilot suggestion pill shown below the page title.

label.description: Short action description shown in the pill
label.title: Label

prompt.description: The full prompt sent to Copilot when clicked. This is the data the LLM should fill in — the *intent* behind the suggestion.
prompt.title: Prompt

CopilotSuggestion.title: CopilotSuggestion

DashboardBody.description:
Maps to → Storybook: Card > CardGrid (multi-column layout)

Used for: Azure Dashboard, custom dashboards.

LLM prompt: "Describe each dashboard widget: title, type (resource list,
KPI, chart, quickstart list, promo), grid position, and sample data."
DashboardBody.title: DashboardBody

DashboardWidget.description: One widget tile on a dashboard.

items.description: Widget content items.  Structure depends on widget_type.  e.g. resource_list: [{'name': 'coherence-preview', 'type': 'Static Web App'}]
items.title: Items

DashboardWidget.title: DashboardWidget

DataGridBody.description:
Maps to → Storybook: DataGrid > ResourceList

Used for: resource lists, resource group tables, audit logs, etc.
The LLM fills in columns, sample rows, and pagination config.

LLM prompt: "Define the table columns.  Which columns are sortable?
Which show status badges?  Provide 3-8 sample rows.  Is there pagination?"

rows.description: Sample data rows (3-8 recommended for story)
rows.title: Rows

total_count.description: Total item count for pagination display, e.g. 28
total_count.title: Total Count

group_by.description: Column key to group rows by, e.g. 'resourceGroup'
group_by.title: Group By

DataGridBody.title: DataGridBody

DiagnosticsBody.description:
Maps to → Storybook: Input > Search + Card > Default + DataDisplay > MessageBar

Used for: Diagnose and solve problems, troubleshooting pages.

LLM prompt: "What is the search prompt text?  List the alert cards
with their title, description, and severity."

info_note.description: Informational note below search, e.g. privacy notice
info_note.title: Info Note

DiagnosticsBody.title: DiagnosticsBody

FieldType.description: Form field control types used in SettingsForm body template.
FieldType.title: FieldType

FilterBarSpec.description:
Maps to → Storybook: FilterBar (Composed)

LLM prompt: "Does this page have a filter bar?  List the filter
dropdowns and any pre-applied filter tags."

active_filters.description: Pre-applied filters shown as removable tags
active_filters.title: Active Filters

FilterBarSpec.title: FilterBarSpec

FilterDefinition.description: One dropdown filter control in the filter bar.

options.description: Predefined filter options.  Empty = dynamic / loaded at runtime.
options.title: Options

FilterDefinition.title: FilterDefinition

FormField.description: One form control in a settings section.

value.description: Current value for toggles ('Yes'/'No'), text inputs, etc.
value.title: Value

info_tooltip.description: Show an (i) info icon next to the label
info_tooltip.title: Info Tooltip

FormField.title: FormField

FormFieldOption.description: Option for radio groups, dropdowns, etc.
FormFieldOption.title: FormFieldOption

FormSection.description: A titled group of form fields.

title.description: Section heading, e.g. 'Default user role permissions'
title.title: Title

learn_more_link.description: Show a 'Learn more' link below the heading
learn_more_link.title: Learn More Link

FormSection.title: FormSection

InfoBannerSpec.description:
Maps to → Fluent MessageBar (Storybook: DataDisplay > MessageBar)

LLM prompt: "Is there an important banner at the top of the content
area?  What does it say?  Is it info / warning / error?"

action_label.description: Optional CTA link text, e.g. 'Learn more', 'View guidance'
action_label.title: Action Label

InfoBannerSpec.title: InfoBannerSpec

LandingCard.description: An illustration card on a landing page.

illustration.description: Illustration asset name or placeholder description
illustration.title: Illustration

LandingCard.title: LandingCard

LandingPageBody.description:
Maps to → Storybook: Card > Default + Button > Primary/Secondary

Used for: Resource Manager overview, service landing pages,
empty states, getting-started pages.

LLM prompt: "What is the centered heading?  Describe 1-3 illustration
cards with their titles, descriptions, and action buttons."
LandingPageBody.title: LandingPageBody

LayoutType.description:
Top-level layout decision.

side_panel  – resource detail / service blade (220 px side nav + content)
full_width  – home, create wizard, browse-all, marketplace
dashboard   – multi-column widget grid (Azure Dashboard)
LayoutType.title: LayoutType

MarketingBody.description:
Maps to → Storybook: Card > Default + DataDisplay > Overview

Used for: feature upsell pages, password reset, premium feature promos.

LLM prompt: "What is the hero heading?  Describe the feature pitch
paragraph.  List benefit cards with titles and descriptions."

hero_icon.description: Large icon/illustration for the hero section
hero_icon.title: Hero Icon

benefits_heading.description: Heading above benefit cards, e.g. 'Why use self-service password reset?'
benefits_heading.title: Benefits Heading

upsell_banner.description: CTA banner text, e.g. 'Get a free Premium trial to use this feature →'
upsell_banner.title: Upsell Banner

MarketingBody.title: MarketingBody

NavItem.description: One item in the side navigation panel.

label.description: Display text (required for link and group_header)
label.title: Label

NavItem.title: NavItem

PageHeaderSpec.description:
Maps to → Storybook: PageTitleBar (Composed)

LLM prompt: "What is the page title?  What icon represents this
service?  Should there be a star/favorite button?  List 0-5
Copilot suggestions that would be useful on this page."

subtitle.description: Secondary text below title, e.g. 'Microsoft', 'Default Directory'
subtitle.title: Subtitle

copilot_suggestions.description: Copilot suggestion pills.  Leave empty for pages that don't have Copilot integration.  Typically 0-5 items.
copilot_suggestions.title: Copilot Suggestions

PageHeaderSpec.title: PageHeaderSpec

PageType.description: Semantic page type — drives default component selection.
PageType.title: PageType

RowData.description: One row of sample data for the DataGrid.  Keys match ColumnDefinition.key.
RowData.title: RowData

SettingsFormBody.description:
Maps to → Storybook: Input, Selection (Composed form pattern)

Used for: User settings, resource configuration, policy settings.

LLM prompt: "Break the settings into sections.  For each section,
list the form controls: toggles, radio groups, text inputs, dropdowns.
Include current values and available options."

show_save_cancel.description: Show Save / Cancel buttons at the bottom
show_save_cancel.title: Show Save Cancel

SettingsFormBody.title: SettingsFormBody

SideNavSpec.description:
Maps to → Storybook: SideNavigation (Composed)

LLM prompt: "List all navigation items in the left sidebar.
Mark which one is currently selected.  Group items under
expandable headers if applicable."

search_enabled.description: Show a search box at the top of the nav
search_enabled.title: Search Enabled

SideNavSpec.title: SideNavSpec

StorybookRef.description:
Points the LLM (and builder) at the exact Storybook component / story
to use.  Every structural section carries one of these so generated
code always traces back to a documented component.

The `component` and `story` values must match entries in
src/component-registry.json.  The `import_path` is the story file
path from the registry (e.g. 'src/stories/composed/CommandBar.stories.tsx').

component.description: Component name matching the 'name' field in component-registry.json, e.g. 'AzureBreadcrumb', 'CommandBar', 'DataGrid', 'PageTabs'
component.title: Component

story.description: Specific story variant matching one of the 'stories' entries in component-registry.json, e.g. 'Default', 'WithActiveTags'
story.title: Story

import_path.description: Story file path matching the 'storyFile' field in component-registry.json, e.g. 'src/stories/composed/CommandBar.stories.tsx'
import_path.title: Import Path

StorybookRef.title: StorybookRef

TabBody.description:
Associates a tab (by value) with its body content template.

The `tab_value` must match one of the TabDefinition.value entries
in tabs_spec.  Each tab gets exactly one body template — the LLM
picks the template type and fills in its fields.

tab_value.description: Must match a TabDefinition.value from tabs_spec — this is the key that binds the tab to its content.
tab_value.title: Tab Value

body.description: The body template rendered when this tab is active
body.title: Body

TabBody.title: TabBody

value.description: Unique identifier for this tab — used as the key in tab_bodies. Convention: lowercase-kebab, e.g. 'overview', 'getting-started'
value.title: Value

badge_count.description: Optional count badge on the tab, e.g. 5 for '5 alerts'
badge_count.title: Badge Count

TabDefinition.title: TabDefinition

TabsSpec.description:
Maps to → Storybook: PageTabs (Components/PageTabs)

The PageTabs component renders a horizontal tab strip with an
underline indicator.  Each tab's `value` is the key that maps
to a body template in `BodySpec.tab_bodies`.

LLM prompt: "Does the page have tabs?  List each tab with a
unique value, display label, optional icon, and which one is
selected by default."

default_tab.description: The `value` of the tab selected by default. Must match one of the tab values.
default_tab.title: Default Tab

TabsSpec.title: TabsSpec

description:
Complete specification for one Azure Portal page.

This is the root object the LLM fills in.  Each field maps to a
visible section of the page and references the Storybook component
that renders it.

┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  breadcrumb                             │  → AzureBreadcrumb
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  page_header  (+ copilot_suggestions)   │  → PageTitleBar
├────────┬────────────────────────────────┤
│        │  info_banner (optional)         │  → MessageBar
│  side  │  command_bar (optional)         │  → CommandBar
│  _nav  │  filter_bar (optional)          │  → FilterBar
│        │  tabs (optional)                │  → TabList
│(opt.)  │  body  (template)               │  → DataGrid / Card / Form / …
│        │                                 │
└────────┴─────────────────────────────────┘

LLM workflow:
1. Pick layout type (side_panel / full_width / dashboard)
2. Pick page type (browse / detail / settings / …)
3. Fill in each section top-to-bottom
4. Pick body template and fill in its fields

page_id.description: Unique identifier for the page, e.g. 'monitor-overview', 'rg-list'
page_id.title: Page Id

service_name.description: Azure service name, e.g. 'Monitor', 'Resource Manager', 'Microsoft Entra ID'
service_name.title: Service Name

resource_type.description: Resource type if applicable, e.g. 'Resource groups', 'Users', 'Virtual machines'
resource_type.title: Resource Type

side_nav.description: Present when layout is 'side_panel'.  Omit for full_width.

info_banner.description: Optional warning/info banner at the top of the content area

command_bar.description: Optional action toolbar below the header

filter_bar.description: Optional search + filter controls (typical on browse pages)

body.description: Main content area — pick a template and fill in its fields

title: PageSpec
